description: Board-level SLA compliance report with business impact analysis. Designed for QBR presentations, leadership reviews, and compliance reporting.

options.content:
SLA & Business Impact Report

Observability Platform • Rolling $slo_period Window • Auto-Generated

Report Period
$slo_period Rolling

panels.description: Overall platform SLA based on successful HTTP responses. Enterprise target: 99.9%
panels.title: Platform SLA

panels.description: Contractual SLA target for the observability platform.
panels.title: SLA Target

panels.description: Percentage of $slo_period error budget consumed. At 100%, the SLA is breached.
panels.title: Error Budget Used

panels.description: Estimated mean time between error-rate incidents. Higher is better. Target: >168h (1 week).
panels.title: Mean Time Between Incidents

panels.description: Percentage of requests that experienced server errors during the SLO window.
panels.title: Impacted Request %

panels.description: Rolling 1-hour SLA compliance over the selected period. The green dashed line is the 99.9% SLA target. Dips below this line consume error budget.
panels.title: SLA Compliance Over Time

panels.description: SLO compliance by individual service with their respective latency targets.
panels.title: SLO Compliance by Service

panels.description: Error budget remaining by service. When budget hits 0%, the service has breached its SLO for the period.
panels.title: Error Budget by Service

panels.description: Error budget burn rate. Values above 1.0 mean the budget is being consumed faster than it can sustain for the full period.
panels.title: Error Budget Burn Rate

panels.description: Estimated number of requests that experienced server errors during the SLO window.
panels.title: Estimated Impacted Requests

panels.description: Endpoints generating the most errors. Focus reliability improvements here.
panels.title: Top Error-Producing Endpoints

panels.description: Slowest API endpoints by P95 latency. These create the worst user experience.
panels.title: Slowest User-Facing Operations

panels.description: SLO compliance per cluster for Mimir write path. Shows which clusters are meeting the 0.5s latency target.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster) (rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster"}[30m])) / (sum by (cluster) (rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf", route=~"/api/v1/push|api/prom/push", cluster=~"$cluster"}[30m])) + 0.001) * 100

panels.title: SLO Compliance by Cluster

panels.description: P95 write latency per cluster. Lower is better. Target: under 0.5 seconds.
panels.title: Cluster P95 Latency Comparison

options.content:
